description_long: This object is a compact, modern sewing machine with a rectangular base and a rounded, horizontal arm extending over the workspace. The body is a smooth, off-white color with minimal visible seams, and the brand name 'LOWRANI' is printed on the lower left side. The machine features a vertical needle bar and presser foot assembly, with a flat metal plate beneath for fabric support. On the right side, a large circular handwheel is present, while the top surface has a few small protruding controls. The overall design is streamlined and functional, with no visible decorative elements or complex control panels.
description: A compact, off-white sewing machine with a smooth, minimalist design, featuring a visible handwheel and simple controls.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow face, needle area, and presser foot assembly.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the 'LOWRANI' logo, needle area, and flat workspace.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the large circular handwheel and the back of the machine.
description_view_3: Right side view with the workspace, needle area, and a clear view of the machine's overall shape.
attribute_brand_logo: The brand logo 'LOWRANI' is printed in blue text on the lower left side of the machine's body.
